cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when David could have gone to the football field. The question gives me several time intervals when David was seen doing different things by different people. The football field was closed after 10pm, so David had to go before that. First, let me list out all the known times David was doing things: - David woke up at 5am. So from 5am onward, he's up. - Steven saw David buying a phone from 5am to 6am. So 5am-6am, he's at the electronics store. - Kimberly saw him taking photos near the Leaning Tower of Pisa from 6am to 8am. - Betty saw him working
